title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat, generate, embed, pull, and push models with a simple async/sync API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that wraps Ollama for local LLM chains, agents, retrieval, and tool-calling.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). Supports RAG, multi-model chats, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with builder-style API, streaming, and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-cli
summary: A more interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama REST API with Tokio support.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that connects to local Ollama instance with session memory.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library for Ollama with C# 12 nullable reference types, streaming, and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, Nginx, and GPU support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional WebUI, PVC, and GPU node-selector.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama with ActiveModel-style interfaces and Rails integration examples.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with streaming support and idiomatic error handling.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that wraps Ollama for dependency injection and guards in TypeScript backends.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app providing management commands and REST endpoints to interact with Ollama.
